_comment: Tiny Decks — Shareholder Review template. DEMO/synthetic data for Northwind Holdings (DEMO). Not real Tiny figures.
title: Northwind Holdings — Annual Review 2026

slides.title: Annual Review 2026
slides.subtitle: Full-year results, portfolio performance, balance sheet and forward outlook.

slides.title: The Period in Review
commentary: A record year. Revenue and Adj. EBITDA both reached all-time highs on broad-based portfolio strength.
Margin discipline held. Operating leverage drove margin expansion despite continued reinvestment.

slides.title: Financial Highlights
commentary: Revenue up $16M YoY led by Acme (+$6.1M) and Globex (+$4.3M), with every operating company growing.
Adj. EBITDA up $4.8M as margin expansion outpaced revenue growth on improving mix.
Leverage fell to 1.5x from 1.9x, on EBITDA growth plus $9M of scheduled debt repayment.
slides.footnote: DEMO / illustrative figures for Northwind Holdings. Not actual Tiny Ltd. results.

slides.title: Revenue & Margin Trend
commentary: Five straight years of growth. Revenue compounded ~12% annually while margin climbed from 22% to 27%.
FY26 was a record on both top line and profitability.
slides.note: Revenue in $000s (columns); Adj. EBITDA margin % (line, right axis). DEMO data.

slides.title: Portfolio Performance
slides.note: Consolidated Adj. EBITDA includes ~$7.6M of head-office costs net of intercompany. DEMO figures.

slides.title: Balance Sheet
commentary: Net debt down $12M to $47M as free cash flow funded both debt paydown and reinvestment.
Equity grew to $118M on retained earnings; book NAV per share of ~$14.50 (illustrative).
slides.footnote: Illustrative balance-sheet figures for Northwind Holdings (DEMO). Not actual Tiny Ltd. results.

slides.title: FY27 Priorities
slides.lead: Four things we are focused on heading into next year.
bullets: Scale the winners — concentrate growth capital behind Acme and Globex, our highest-return compounders.
Margin to 28%+ — extend operating leverage through shared services and disciplined hiring.
Deleverage to ~1.0x — continue scheduled repayment while preserving M&A optionality.
Disciplined M&A — one or two tuck-in acquisitions at attractive multiples, funded from free cash flow.
slides.footnote: Forward-looking; DEMO illustration only and subject to change.

slides.title: Thank you
slides.subtitle: Questions and discussion welcome.
slides.contact: Office of the CFO · Northwind Holdings (DEMO)
